title: hypericum pumilum subsp. diffusum
intro: Hypericum pumilum subsp. diffusum, also known as Alpine St. John's Wort, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Hypericaceae. This plant contains hypericin and hyperforin, compounds with known medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Alpine St. John's Wort include its potential to improve mood, reduce anxiety and depression, and protect against oxidative stress. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
